title: Richard Trifan, Vice President, Government Relations and Trade, The Eurasia Center, Washington, D.C.
description: Richard Trifan, Vice President, Government Relations and Trade, The Eurasia Center, Washington, D.C. addresses the Schiller Institute's "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought, April 13-14, 2017.
